title: Which Evangelion music to wake up with
display_title: Which Evangelion music to wake up with
wikitext:
[]: Which Evangelion music to wake up with?             Quote Post by Galmo13 » Tue Feb 11, 2020 5:41 pm I want to change my waking up music, and I was thinking that an Eva song could be really great, but I don't know what song is the best to wake up with. Is there anyone here who wake up everyday with an Eva song?

[]: Re: Which Evangelion music to wake up with?             Quote Post by Blockio » Tue Feb 11, 2020 8:47 pm I don't use it personally, but I imagine A Step Forward into Terror being a pretty good way to start your day

[]: Re: Which Evangelion music to wake up with?             Quote Post by Zoop » Wed Feb 12, 2020 7:54 am I have learned that if I set favorite music as wakeup tone, I will soon start to associate that music with having to wake up, and thus start hating it. So speaking from personal experience, I wouldn't recommend it That said, I've had Dusk-Tokyo III (EM06) for a while for in weekends.

[]: Re: Which Evangelion music to wake up with?             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Feb 12, 2020 9:40 am Obligatory "Waking up in the morning".

[]: Re: Which Evangelion music to wake up with?             Quote Post by MirrorUniverseAsuka » Fri Feb 14, 2020 11:18 pm AYYIYIYIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIII!! Wait, wrong IP. Honestly though, Misato's theme is a good one, especially if your routine includes slamming a beer rather than drinking coffee.

[]: Re: Which Evangelion music to wake up with?             Quote Post by The Flying Fortress » Sun Mar 01, 2020 7:38 pm Zoop wrote: I have learned that if I set favorite music as wakeup tone, I will soon start to associate that music with having to wake up, and thus start hating it.

[]: Re: Which Evangelion music to wake up with?             Quote Post by Robowang » Sun Mar 29, 2020 10:58 am End of Midsummer will get you up and moving fast. It will also cause your wife to confusedly yell at you if it wakes her up as well.

[]: Re: Which Evangelion music to wake up with?             Quote Post by Joseki » Tue Mar 31, 2020 12:59 pm 2EM09_YAMASHITA

[]: Re: Which Evangelion music to wake up with?             Quote Post by Bhorium » Tue Mar 31, 2020 7:36 pm If you want to wake up to begin vanquishing your enemies immediately, the one to go with is, of course, "False Regeneration".

[]: Re: Which Evangelion music to wake up with?             Quote Post by Derantor » Thu Apr 02, 2020 8:17 am Komm Süßer Tod, go back to sleep afterwards. Sorry, this joke just had to be made, and I wanted to do it before anybody else did

[]: Re: Which Evangelion music to wake up with?             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Thu Apr 02, 2020 9:01 pm Joseki wrote: 2EM09_YAMASHITA
